Introduction
    Once upon a time Central Europe was full of primeval forests. Those forests have disappeared long time ago. Only some green 'islands' seem to outlive the time. This documentary movie tells the story of those last oases.

Also known as: Mythos Wald - Der Kampf ums Licht
